name: Oyster Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil and margarine in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add onion and bell pepper; cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in parsley and green onion.
4. Add hot water and oyster liquid to the pan; stir well.
5. Mix Worcestershire sauce, Kitchen Bouquet, hot sauce, salt, and white pepper into the mixture.
6. Bring the stew to a simmer, then add garlic and cook for another 10 minutes.
7. Stir in the cooked oysters until heated through.
8. Adjust seasoning with additional salt or pepper if needed.
9. Serve the stew over cooked rice or noodles.
